Letra_cifra:
[Intro] F7M  Eb7M  C#7M
        C7M  G7(13-)

C7M           Fm/C                C7M

         Gm7        F#7(13)   F7M

       Am7      D7    G7M

           F7M           C7M

      Fm/C                    C7M

            Gm7            F#7(13)  F7M

      Am7            D7    G7M  F/G

C7M            F#m7(5-)      B7(13-)  Em7

          C#m7(5-)    F#7(13-)    Bm7

      G#m7(5-)   G7(5-)   F#m/E  Dm7  F/G

      Gm7        F#7(13)   F7M
